title: Virtuoso 7.1.0 does not return correct datatype for language-specified strings
description:
Using
http://affymetrix.bio2rdf.org/sparql
SELECT ?datatype
WHERE {
 ?s a http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:Probeset .
 ?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .
  FILTER isLiteral(?o)
  BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) .
}
limit 1

returns an empty value, but is expected to return rdf:langString as per http://www.w3.org/TR/sparql11-query/#func-datatype
LANG(?o) does return the language string.
poc:
SELECT ?datatype
WHERE {
 ?s a http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:Probeset .
 ?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .
  FILTER isLiteral(?o)
  BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) .
}
limit 1

SELECT ?datatype
WHERE {
?s a http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary/Probeset .
?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .

FILTER isLiteral(?o)
BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) .
}
limit 1

SELECT ?o
WHERE {
?s a http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary/Probeset .
?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .

FILTER isLiteral(?o)
}
limit 1

SELECT ?datatype
WHERE {
?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .

FILTER isLiteral(?o)
BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) .
}
limit 1
key_bug_features: Incorrect datatype returned for language-specified strings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, lang_title VARCHAR(255) LANG);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, title, lang_title) VALUES (1, 'Sample Title', 'Sample Title'@en);
SELECT id, title, LANG(lang_title) AS lang FROM test_strings WHERE isLiteral(lang_title);
SELECT DATATYPE(lang_title) AS datatype FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ?datatype WHERE { ?s a <http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:Probeset> . ?s <http://purl.org/dc/terms/title> ?o . FILTER isLiteral(?o) BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) . } LIMIT 1;
